name: scope_caveat
value: Use the wind-tunnel CT/CP table as a measured axial high-J sanity check. Keep it separate from UIUC low-J 5-inch data, APC prediction rows, and NASA edgewise high-mu rotor data.
note: The Mejzlik propeller and wind-tunnel setup are not the current 5-inch FPV quad prop/airframe.
